title: Garlicky Fluffy Ethiopian Egg Noodles Stir-fry
description: A comforting and flavorful dish featuring egg noodles with a savory blend of garlic, vegan-friendly seasonings for a delightful plant-based meal.

ingredients.name: 2 cloves garlic
ingredients.notes: Mashed with some olive oil for a flavorful base

ingredients.name: 2 tbsp olive oil
ingredients.notes: For stir-frying and adding to the egg noodles

ingredients.name: 1 tsp salt
ingredients.notes: Regular table salt can be used instead of sea salt

ingredients.name: 1/4 cup vegan butter or margarine (for glazing, optional)
ingredients.notes: To add a rich flavor to the noodles

ingredients.name: Juice of 1 lemon
ingredients.notes: Optional for added freshness and acidity

instructions: Pour boiling water over the egg noodles and let them cook until tender, about 3-4 minutes. Drain well.
Mash the garlic with a bit of olive oil in a small bowl to make a paste that will help flavor the dish as it cooks.
Heat olive oil in a wok or large skillet over medium-high heat. Add the garlic paste and cook until fragrant, about 1 minute.
Add the cooked egg noodles to the skillet and toss well with the garlic paste to coat them evenly.
Stir in salt to taste and mix well. If using vegan butter, add it now for a richer flavor.
Serve immediately, garnished with fresh cilantro and lemon juice if desired.
